category_sources: Official SourceForge page categorizes EPSILON under graphics, image processing, and image processing libraries.
source_facts.description says it is a powerful wavelet image compressor.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project title is EPSILON.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project exposes a Wiki tab as the project documentation surface.
Official SourceForge project page is the main project surface and includes summary, categories, platform, and language metadata.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page exposes a Code tab for the project.
source_facts.homepage points to the official SourceForge project.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge page lists command-line UI and C/Perl implementation languages.
